creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to groenveld from comment #106)
I am also unable to update kBuild on my system running head. I believe the issue is the addition of native ssp  to the base. All release systems seem to only provide ssp via the code included in gcc12 and 13. I suspect that there is some incompatibility between the two implementations.and kBuild fails to build when the software in base is used. I'm going to try moving aside the ssp code installed in the base system (/usr/lib and /usr/inlude) and see if that fixes my issue.
